name: Meta Ads
one_liner: Meta's Marketing API (part of the Facebook Graph API) lets developers programmatically create, manage, and report on advertising campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, and Meta's ad network.
primary_auth: OAuth2 access tokens (user, page, or system-user access tokens issued via Meta's OAuth 2.0 flow); long-lived system-user tokens are standard for server-to-server ad automation.
access_notes: An app is created instantly and gets Standard/Development access to the Marketing API, but this dev tier is heavily throttled (~60 quota points, read/write only against ad accounts you have a role on). Real production use requires Advanced Access, which is gated by App Review, Business Verification, and the Ads Management Standard Access / 'Marketing API Access Tier' feature review (screencast demonstrating each permission). Reviews can take days to weeks/months.
api_notes: Marketing API is a large REST/Graph API surface (100+ endpoints/edges: campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, audiences, Insights reporting, catalogs, etc.) exposed over the Graph API at graph.facebook.com. Official SDKs provided for PHP, Python, Java, Ruby, Node.js.
mcp_notes: Meta shipped an official MCP server ('AI connectors' / Meta Ads MCP) around April 29 2026 at endpoint https://mcp.facebook.com/ads, exposing ~29 tools (reporting, ad creation/management, catalog, signals diagnostics) for use with Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity remote-connector setups; described as free and rolling out gradually. Multiple community/third-party servers also exist (e.g., pipeboard-co/meta-ads-mcp, AdKit).
main_blocker: Production API access is gated behind App Review, Business Verification, and Advanced Access approval; the instant self-serve dev tier is too throttled for real workloads.

evidence.claim: At creation an app has Standard access; Advanced Access (Full Access) requires App Review, business verification, and a screencast demonstrating each permission; Ads Management Standard Access feature being renamed Marketing API Access Tier.
Development Access provides only ~60 quota points; Standard Access unlocks 9,000 points but requires App Review approval.
Meta launched an official MCP server ('AI connectors') on April 29 2026 at https://mcp.facebook.com/ads with 29 tools, free, supporting Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity.
Meta Business Help Centre documents an AI Ads connector for managing ads through AI agents.

open_questions: Could not load the official developers.facebook.com authorization page (404 on the tried URL) to confirm exact token types verbatim; official MCP endpoint/tool count and free status corroborated mainly via secondary sources plus the Meta Business Help Centre page rather than a full official spec page.
